posts.name: Stas Medvedev
posts.cooked:
I have recently attended a very insightful Zoom tasting with Olivier Lamy from Domaine Hubert Lamy.

I was so much inspired with that session so decided to do my small contribution and wrote an article which you might find helpful to learn more about this outstanding winemaker in Saint Aubin.

Since it is a quite a long read, I would rather post a link to the article.

Enjoy reading and I will appreciate for your feedback and comments.

Domaine Hubert Lamy profile

link_counts.title: Domaine Hubert Lamy. Domaine profile, terroir insights… | by Stas Medvedev | Medium

posts.name: Stas Medvedev
posts.cooked:
Thank you for this! Their 2017 En Remilly is in my latest order from a Parisian exporter I deal with. Looking forward to it, but it might need cellaring.

2017 En Remilly is showing very well now as many 2017s. That’s the beauty of this vintage. Of course it has a hell of the potential going forward and will develop over time with bottle aging. I hope you have ordered a case, so that you can observe its evolution.

I can’t agree more. That is a must have from Saint Aubin.

posts.name: Stas Medvedev
posts.cooked:
[*]

interesting that haute densité was basically an accident.

Yeah, funny coincidence! I am very glad Olivier holds for this approach as it is extremely labour intensive and very expensive. But the result pays off.
